phase: P0.7 FULL MVP WIRING AUDIT — ROUTES / NAV / RBAC / SESSION / API CONTRACTS

fullMvpRouteNavAuditTable.detail: audit:mvp-wiring generated full route/nav table with required columns and verify:mvp-wiring PASS (44 total, 0 fail).

adminNavProof.detail: Admin nav links resolve to valid routes/components and remain admin-gated.

userNavProof.detail: User nav links resolve correctly and are isolated from admin-only routes.

pilotAdminProof.detail: verify:admin-ux-email confirms pilot role ADMIN via live /auth/me and admin users listing.

ayhanAdminProof.detail: Ayhan role corrected to ADMIN through existing PATCH /admin/users/:id/role endpoint; strict verifier now passes.

mahirUserProof.detail: verify:admin-ux-email confirms Mahir role USER under strict role checks.

ctrlF5PersistenceProof.detail: Session storage truth reconciled in useAuth; verify:session-persistence PASS with live checks.

noLogoutOnNavClickProof.detail: Navbar switched from hard reload <a href> to SPA <Link to>; transient hydrate failures keep storage-backed user state unless token is truly invalid.

noFalsePassVerifierProof.detail: verify:admin-ux-email now fails when ayhan role != ADMIN and Mahir role != USER; contradictory detail can no longer PASS.

401_403BehaviorProof.detail: 401 handling remains explicit in apiFetch/auth flow without loop; 403 admin denials stay access-controlled via middleware and Access Denied path.

forgotPasswordEmailStateProof.detail: Generic public forgot-password response preserved, EMAIL_NOT_CONFIGURED remains explicit admin-safe diagnostic, and no reset token logging introduced.

deploymentTruthProof.detail: verify:deployment-truth PASS after final wiring fixes.
